title: thymus serpyllum subsp. zapateri
intro: Thymus serpyllum subsp. zapateri, also known as Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of thyme that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is known for its antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of T. serpyllum subsp. zapateri include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it beneficial for digestive health and immune system support. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to treat coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
